identity.name: WeConnect Support
identity.core_philosophy: Linear-esque Efficiency. Density without clutter. Speed is a feature.

rules: Data tables must use 'Inter' with tabular-nums feature.
Never center-align text in dashboards unless it's a standalone empty state.
Use font-medium (500) for data labels, font-normal (400) for values.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium

inputs.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground font-medium bg-muted/50

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text. Use APCA for subtle grays.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Header structure.
Use 'recharts' for the dashboard charts (BarChart, LineChart).
Use 'react-hook-form' + 'zod' for the New Ticket form.
Use 'tanstack/react-table' for the Ticket List (sorting, filtering).
Ensure the 'Status' and 'Priority' badges use the specific color mappings defined in 'colors.status' and 'colors.priority'.
The 'Reverse Logistics' section should be a distinct module, possibly a tab in the Ticket Details or a separate page.
For the 'Timeline', use a vertical list with connecting lines (border-l) and relative positioning.
Implement Dark Mode using the 'next-themes' or a simple React Context that toggles the 'dark' class on the html element.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Do not center-align the main app container. Use full width with a max-width constraint for content.
Ensure all inputs have associated labels.
